constructors.name: LicenseData(String, String, String, LicenseBuildType, Int32, Nullable<DateTime>, Icon, Boolean, Boolean)
constructors.signature: public LicenseData(string productLicense, string serialNumber, string licenseTitle, LicenseBuildType buildType, int licenseCount, Nullable<DateTime> expirationDate, Icon productIcon, bool requiresOnlineValidation, bool isUpgradeFromPreviousVersion)

params.name: productLicense
params.doc: License string to be saved by ZooClient

params.name: serialNumber
params.doc: Serial number to be displayed to end user

params.name: licenseTitle
params.doc: Title of license (Rhino 6.0 Evaluation)

params.name: buildType
params.doc: A LicenseBuildType value

params.name: licenseCount
params.doc: Number of licenses represented by this string. Allows the Zoo to hand out multiple license keys when greater than 1.

params.name: expirationDate
params.doc: Date when license expires, null if license never expires.

params.name: productIcon
params.doc: Icon to display in Rhino License Options user interface when showing this license

params.name: requiresOnlineValidation
params.doc: True if online validation server should be called with this license key; false otherwise. If true, caller must pass implementation of VerifyOnlineValidationCodeDelegate to GetLicense/AskUserForLicense

params.name: isUpgradeFromPreviousVersion
params.doc: True if this license key requires a previous version license; false otherwise. If true, caller must pass implementation of VerifyPreviousVersionLicenseDelegate to GetLicense/AskUserForLicense

methods.name: Dispose
methods.summary: Releases all resources used by the LicenseData

methods.name: IsNotValid
methods.summary: Indicates whether a LicenseData object is either null or invalid.

params.name: data
params.doc: [Missing <param name="data"/> documentation for "M:Rhino.PlugIns.LicenseData.IsNotValid(Rhino.PlugIns.LicenseData)"]

params.name: ignoreExpirationDate
params.doc: [Missing <param name="ignoreExpirationDate"/> documentation for "M:Rhino.PlugIns.LicenseData.IsValid(System.Boolean)"]

methods.name: IsValid(LicenseData)
methods.summary: Indicates whether a LicenseData object is not null and valid.

params.name: data
params.doc: [Missing <param name="data"/> documentation for "M:Rhino.PlugIns.LicenseData.IsValid(Rhino.PlugIns.LicenseData)"]

properties.name: BuildType
properties.summary: The build of the product that this license work with. When your product requests a license from the Zoo, it will specify one of these build types.

properties.name: DateToExpire
properties.summary: The date and time the license is set to expire. This is provided by the plug in that validated the license. This time value should be in Coordinated Universal Time (UTC).

properties.name: ErrorMessage
properties.summary: Error message set by calls to callback functions

properties.name: IsUpgradeFromPreviousVersion
properties.summary: Set to true if this license requires a previous version license to be entered. Caller must also pass VerifyPreviousVersionLicenseDelegate to GetLicense/AskUserForLicense.

properties.name: LicenseCount
properties.summary: The number of instances supported by this license. This is provided by the plug in that validated the license.

properties.name: LicenseTitle
properties.summary: The title of the license. This is provided by the plug-in that validated the license. (e.g. "Rhinoceros 6.0 Commercial")

properties.name: ProductIcon
properties.summary: The product's icon. This will displayed in the "license" page in the Options dialog. Note, this can be null. Note, LicenseData creates it's own copy of the icon.

properties.name: ProductLicense
properties.summary: The actual product license. This is provided by the plug-in that validated the license.

properties.name: RequiresOnlineValidation
properties.summary: Set to true if this license requires online validation. Caller must also pass VerifyOnlineValidationCodeDelegate to GetLicense/AskUserForLicense

properties.name: SerialNumber
properties.summary: The "for display only" product license. This is provided by the plug-in that validated the license.
